body:
## Content
- Added documentation for Accelerators
- Added examples and scripts for the journal submission

### @odunbar - additional content
- (local-only) ETKI bug-fix - present in `EnsembleKalmanProcesses#main`
- Figures all save in PDF not just PNG
- Made trials consistent in all (non-UKI) experiments, random trial means sampling initial ensemble and data realizations. For UKI it is sampling the data only. 
- we use `observation` over `(y,\Gamma)` now
- using `fillalpha` in some plots to aid readability in the uncertainty ribbon
- Julia formatter passes
- Add LaTeXStrings into toml where required
- no longer using "cost" function, instead always using get_error
title: Add documentation for Accelerators and update examples to reproduce journal submission
